56689.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
56689.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

56690.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
56690.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

56691.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
56691.description: It's '80s month here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

56692.title: Forever 80s
56692.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

56693.title: Wild Boys Of The 80s!
56693.description: These boys were born to be wild in the 80s! Check out all of their huge hits and iconic anthems right here!

56694.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
56694.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!

56695.title: ... So 80s!
56695.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
